attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER AS BK_DEAL_ID,
DEAL.APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE AS APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DTM,
-999 AS RU_LGL_ASRR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
-999 AS RU_FN_CNTLR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
-- CAST(COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,-999) AS BIGINT) AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_ID,
COALESCE(CAST(CAST(DEAL.OPPTY_DEAL_ID  AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(15)),CAST(CAST(DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(15))) AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_ID,
--COALESCE(SFDC_OPTY_ID,OPTY_NUMBER) AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_ID,
COALESCE(NP.OPPORTUNITY_KEY,-999) AS OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
CASE WHEN	TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5,7)  THEN DEAL.MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE 
 WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (1,3) THEN QUOTE.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE 
ELSE	DEAL.MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE END  AS DEAL_EXPIRATION_DT,
COALESCE(CASE	WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5,7) THEN  DEAL.MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME 
	WHEN	TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (1,3) THEN QUOTE.QUOTE_STATUS_NAME 
ELSE	TRIM(DEAL.MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME) END,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_STATUS_CD,
DEAL.EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE AS EXPECTED_CLOSE_DTM,
DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE AS EXPECTED_BOOKING_DT,
TRAN.MIN_DATE AS FIRST_APPROVAL_DT,
COALESCE(DEAL_SCOPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_SCOPE_CD,
CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN(1,3) THEN COALESCE(PDR_PROD_VALUE,0) WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5) THEN COALESCE(MDM_PROD_VALUE,0) ELSE 0 END AS EXPECTED_PRODUCT_VALUE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(DEAL_SOURCE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(DEAL.QUOTE_FLAG,'N') AS QUOTE_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG,'N') AS ACTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN(1,3) THEN COALESCE(PDR_SERV_VALUE,0) WHEN TRIM(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE) IN (2,5) THEN COALESCE(MDM_SERV_VALUE,0) ELSE 0 END AS EXPECTED_SERVICE_VALUE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(DEAL.CDP_FLAG,'N') AS CDP_FLG,
--0 AS EXPECTED_DEAL_BOOKING_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(DCON.DEAL_BOOKING_NET_USD,0) AS EXPECTED_DEAL_BOOKING_USD_AMT, /*Enabling as ST table is replaced with MT as part of CCW data fix Aug rel*/
CASE WHEN DEAL.RFP_FLAG = 'Yes' THEN 'Y' WHEN DEAL.RFP_FLAG = 'No' THEN 'N' ELSE 'N' END AS RFP_FLG,
COALESCE(REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG,'N') AS SRC_RPRTD_REV_RECOGNITION_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG,'N') AS SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLG,
COALESCE(CDP_FLAG,'N') AS SOURCE_REPORTED_CDP_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN SFDC_OPTY_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'WITH OPPORTUNITY' ELSE 'WITHOUT OPPORTUNITY' END AS WITH_OPPORTUNITY_TYPE,
-- COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE,0) AS DEAL_TYPE,
TRIM(COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_TYPE,0)) AS DEAL_TYPE,
COALESCE(DEAL.ACTIVE_WORKFLOW,'UNKNOWN') AS ACTIVE_WORKFLOW_CD,
DEAL.CREATED_ON AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
DEAL.DM_UPDATE_DATE AS DEAL_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
'=' AS APPROVED_ROLE,
AM_A.MEMBER_CCO_ID AS ACCOUNT_MANAGER_USER_ID,
CAM_A.MEMBER_CCO_ID AS CHANNEL_ACCT_MANAGER_USER_ID,
COALESCE(RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DEAL.FIRST_INSTALLATION_DT AS FIRST_INSTALLATION_DTM,
COALESCE(REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG,'N') AS REV_RECOGNITION_FLG,
DEAL.OBJECT_ID AS SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN NCWP.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN DEAL.CREATED_BY ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
DEAL.DEAL_DURATION AS DEAL_DURATION_MONTHS_CNT,
-- -999 AS RU_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
DEAL.DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME AS DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME,
CASE WHEN NCWP_U.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN DEAL.UPDATED_BY ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
'N' AS RU_FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG,
COALESCE(MDM_SERV_VALUE,0) AS RU_MDM_SERVICE_VALUE_USD_AMT,
'N' AS SLA_ROLE,
COALESCE(MDM_PROD_VALUE,0) AS RU_MDM_PRODUCT_VALUE_USD_AMT,
TRIM(COALESCE(PROD_SALES_PATH,'UNKNOWN')) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_PRDT_SLS_PATH_CD,
TRIM(COALESCE(SERV_SALES_PATH,'UNKNOWN')) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_SVC_SLS_PATH_CD,
COALESCE(MDM_SERV_VALUE + PDR_SERV_VALUE,0)RU_SRC_RPTD_DL_SVC_CST_USD_AMT,
TRAN.MAX_DATE AS RU_APPROVED_DT, 
CASE WHEN NCWP.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL AND DEAL.CREATED_BY NOT IN('DATALOAD','DMADM','PDR_ADMIN','DM_MIGRATION') THEN DEAL.CREATED_BY END AS RU_DEAL_BATCH_USER_ID, 
OPTY_NAME AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_OPTY_NAME,
DMASTER.LEVEL6_NODE AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_SALES_TERR_NAME,
DMASTER.MARKET_SEGMENT AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_MARKET_SGMT_NAME,
CAST(DM_CUST.CSC_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE_ID AS BIGINT) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_GLBL_ULTIMATE_ID,
--CUST_MAP.ACCOUNT_NAME AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUSTOMER_NAME,
DM_CUST.ACCOUNT_NAME AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUSTOMER_NAME,
COALESCE(DM_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_TYPE_CD,
CAST(DM_CUST.CSC_COMP_TARGET_ID AS BIGINT) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_COMPANY_TARGET_ID,
-- CAST(DM_CUST.CR_ID AS BIGINT) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUST_REGISTRY_ID,
CAST(DM_CUST.CR_ID AS BIGINT) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CUST_REGISTRY_ID,
COALESCE(DM_CUST.ACCOUNT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD,
DEAL.VERTICAL_MARKET AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_VRTCL_MARKET_NAME,
CAST(DM_CUST.CSC_SITE_ID AS BIGINT) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CSC_SITE_ID,
CASE WHEN NCWP.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL AND DEAL.CREATED_BY NOT IN('DATALOAD','DMADM','PDR_ADMIN','DM_MIGRATION') THEN DEAL.CREATED_BY END AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_CREATED_CCO_ID,
CASE WHEN NCWP_U.CEC_ID IS NOT NULL AND DEAL.UPDATED_BY NOT IN('DATALOAD','DMADM','PDR_ADMIN','DM_MIGRATION') THEN DEAL.UPDATED_BY END AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_UPDATED_CCO_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),                    
USER,                   
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),                    
USER,
DEAL.PDR_PROD_VALUE AS RU_PTNR_INT_DL_GDS_PRD_USD_AMT,
DEAL.PDR_SERV_VALUE AS RU_PTNR_INT_DL_GDS_SVC_USD_AMT,
DEAL.PDR_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE AS RU_PTNR_INIT_DL_STRTGC_VAL_TXT,
0 AS RU_SLA_SERVICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(DEAL.SUBMIT_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS FIRST_SUBMIT_DTM,
COALESCE(CAST(DEAL.SUBMIT_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_FIRST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(DEAL.FINAL_BAND,'UNKNOWN') AS FINAL_BAND_CD,
COALESCE(TRAN.MAX_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS APPROVED_DTM,
COALESCE(TRAN.MIN_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS FIRST_APPROVED_DTM,
'N' AS MULTI_ELEMENT_DEAL_FLG,
RJD.MAX_DATE AS RU_DEAL_REJECTED_DTM,
CAST(RJD.MAX_DATE AS DATE) AS RU_DV_DEAL_REJECTED_DT,
Deal.FINANCIAL_SUMMARY  AS  FINANCIAL_SUMMARY_TXT,
 NULL AS  XAAS_DEAL_FLG,
 DEAL.SOURCE_OPTY_NUMBER  AS  SRC_ASSIGNED_OPPORTUNITY_NUM,  
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_OR_QUOTE,'UNKNOWN')  AS         DEAL_OR_QUOTE_CD, 
GET_WELL_PLAN_DESCR AS RU_GET_WELL_PLAN_TXT , 
COALESCE(FLAG_SPVTG,'N') AS         RU_SVC_PRVDR_VDO_TECH_GRP_FLG, 
COALESCE(DSA_REGSTR_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS         RU_DEAL_NS_REG_DTM,  
COALESCE(DD_ENGAGE_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS         RU_DEAL_DESK_ENGAGED_DT,
COALESCE(DD_ENGAGE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))  AS         RU_DV_DEAL_DESK_ENGAGED_DT,
COALESCE(PRODUCT_COMP,'N') AS         RU_PRDT_COMPONENT_FLG ,
COALESCE(TSS_CORE_COMP,'N')  AS RU_SERVICE_COMPONENT_FLG ,
COALESCE(NS_SUMMARY_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS         RU_NS_TERMS_SUMMARY_TXT, 
COALESCE(APPROVAL_ROUTE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS        RU_APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD,
COALESCE(AS_TRANSACTION_COMP,'N') as RU_AS_TRX_COMPONENT_FLG,
COALESCE(AS_SUBSCRIPTION_COMP,'N') as RU_AS_SBSCRPTN_COMPONENT_FLG,
COALESCE(EXE_SUMMARY_INTERNAL_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') as RU_ES_INTERNAL_DESC_TXT,
 COALESCE(IS_SA_DEAL,'N') as RU_ACQUIRED_COMPANY_DEAL_FLG,
CASE WHEN AUTO_CS_QUOTE = 'True' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as IS_CHNG_SUB_RENEWAL_QUOTE_FLG, 
'CCWR' AS SS_CODE,
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_INTENT,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_INTENT_CD,
COALESCE(DEAL.SFDC_OPTY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_REPORTED_OPPORTUNITY_ID,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_DEAL_RNWL DEAL    

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEAL_ID,SUM(ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS DEAL_BOOKING_NET_USD
--FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_DM_DEAL_CONSUMPTION 
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DEAL_CONSUMPTION_AGGR GROUP BY DEAL_ID) DCON  /*Replaced ST with MT table as part of CCW data fix Aug rel*/
ON DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER = DCON.DEAL_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DMR_DM_TEAM_ASSIGNMENT_RNWL A
WHERE MEMBER_ROLE = 'AM'
AND ACTIVE=1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY A.OBJECT_ID DESC)=1) AM_A
ON AM_A.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DMR_DM_TEAM_ASSIGNMENT_RNWL B
WHERE MEMBER_ROLE = 'CAM'
AND ACTIVE=1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY B.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY B.OBJECT_ID DESC)=1) CAM_A
ON CAM_A.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.OBJECT_ID
/*LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_DMR_DEAL_CUST_MAP_RNWL CMAP 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CMAP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY CMAP.CUSTOMER_OBJECT_ID DESC)=1 ) CUST_MAP
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = CUST_MAP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN  $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_DM_CUSTOMER_RNWL    DM_CUST
ON CUST_MAP.CUSTOMER_OBJECT_ID = DM_CUST.OBJECT_ID*/ /*Commented to retain only ST_INT_RAW_DM_CUSTOMER_RNWL*/
LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_DM_CUSTOMER_RNWL  DM_CUST
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = DM_CUST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DEAL_MASTER_RNWL DMASTER
ON DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER = DMASTER.OPTY_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SHARE_NODE_ID_INT ORDER BY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY DESC)=1) RSH
ON RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT = DMASTER.SHARE_NODE_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT OPP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID, OPP.OPPORTUNITY_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY OPP
       WHERE OPP.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG= 'N' 
       QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OPP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID ORDER BY OPP.SK_OPPORTUNITY_ID_INT DESC)=1) NP
ON DEAL.SFDC_OPTY_ID = NP.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID 
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEAL_OBJECT_ID OBJ,SOURCE SRC ,MIN (TRANSITION_DATE) MIN_DATE , MAX(TRANSITION_DATE) MAX_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_STATE_TRANSITION_INT_VW_RNWL 
                  WHERE      STATE IN (7,13) GROUP BY 1,2) TRAN
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = TRAN.OBJ 
AND CASE WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN(2,5) THEN 2 WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN (1,3) THEN 1 END = TRAN.SRC
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEAL_OBJECT_ID OBJ,SOURCE SRC, MAX(TRANSITION_DATE) MAX_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_STATE_TRANSITION_INT_VW_RNWL 
                  WHERE (STATE = 4 AND SOURCE = 1) OR (STATE =8 AND SOURCE = 2) GROUP BY 1,2)RJD
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID = RJD.OBJ 
AND CASE WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN(2,5) THEN 2 WHEN DEAL.DEAL_TYPE IN (1,3) THEN 1 END =RJD.SRC 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP
ON NCWP.CEC_ID = DEAL.CREATED_BY AND NCWP.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE = 'A'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP_U
ON NCWP_U.CEC_ID = DEAL.UPDATED_BY AND NCWP_U.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE = 'A'
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_NS_DEAL_EXTN_VW_RNWL NS_EXTN
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID=NS_EXTN.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_RNWL_VW QUOTE
ON DEAL.OBJECT_ID=QUOTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID

SELECT *
FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_DMR_DM_TEAM_ASSIGNMENT_RNWL ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL WHERE DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT = ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
AND DEAL.SS_CODE = 'CCWR' -- added to process CCWR DEALS
)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_DEAL_RNWL ICQ WHERE ICQ.OBJECT_ID = ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID)
AND ST.MEMBER_ROLE IN ('AM','CAM')
